Package tellui.core.effect

Class PlainShadow

java.lang.Object
tellui.core.base.View
tellui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
tellui.core.effect.PlainShadow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public class PlainShadow extends AbstractShadow
A simple shadow effect that creates a solid outline around a ContentView. Extends AbstractShadow to provide a basic shadow implementation with optional alpha fade-out.

The PlainShadow can render either a solid outline or a gradient fade-out effect based on the weight values set for each side. When alpha fade-out is enabled, the shadow creates a smooth gradient from full opacity to transparent.

See Also:
  • AbstractShadow
  • ContentView

  • Constructor Details

    • PlainShadow

      public PlainShadow()
      Constructs a PlainShadow with default properties. Alpha fade-out is enabled by default.

    • PlainShadow

      public PlainShadow(ContentView target)
      Constructs a PlainShadow with a specified target ContentView.
      Parameters:
      target - the ContentView to apply the shadow to

  • Method Details

    • isAlphaFadeOutEnabled

      public boolean isAlphaFadeOutEnabled()
      Checks if alpha fade-out effect is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if alpha fade-out is enabled, false for solid outline

    • setAlphaFadeOutEnabled

      public PlainShadow setAlphaFadeOutEnabled(boolean alphaFadeOutEnabled)
      Enables or disables the alpha fade-out effect.
      Parameters:
      alphaFadeOutEnabled - true to enable gradient fade-out, false for solid outline
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeightLeft

      public AbstractShadow setWeightLeft(float weightLeft)
      Sets the left shadow weight. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Parameters:
      weightLeft - the left weight to set (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeightTop

      public AbstractShadow setWeightTop(float weightTop)
      Sets the top shadow weight. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Parameters:
      weightTop - the top weight to set (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeightRight

      public AbstractShadow setWeightRight(float weightRight)
      Sets the right shadow weight. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Parameters:
      weightRight - the right weight to set (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeightBottom

      public AbstractShadow setWeightBottom(float weightBottom)
      Sets the bottom shadow weight. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Parameters:
      weightBottom - the bottom weight to set (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeight

      public AbstractShadow setWeight(float weight)
      Sets uniform shadow weight for all sides. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Parameters:
      weight - the weight value for all sides (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeight

      public AbstractShadow setWeight(float weightHorizontal, float weightVertical)
      Sets shadow weight for horizontal and vertical sides separately. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Parameters:
      weightHorizontal - the weight for left and right sides (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      weightVertical - the weight for top and bottom sides (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining

    • setWeight

      public AbstractShadow setWeight(float left, float top, float right, float bottom)
      Sets individual shadow weights for each side. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value. (must be between MIN_WEIGHT and MAX_WEIGHT)
      Parameters:
      left - the left weight
      top - the top weight
      right - the right weight
      bottom - the bottom weight
      Returns:
      this PlainShadow for method chaining
